feedback_files.tests/test_tenant_ownership_feedback.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path

import pytest

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def database():
    connection = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    for name in ("inventory_catalog.sql", "availability_view.sql"):
        connection.executescript((ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return connection


def test_stock_cannot_borrow_a_product_from_another_merchant():
    db = database()
    db.executemany("INSERT INTO merchant VALUES (?, ?)", [(1, 'North Shop'), (2, 'South Shop')])
    db.execute("INSERT INTO product VALUES (1, 'MUG-12', 'Stoneware mug')")

    with pytest.raises(sqlite3.IntegrityError):
        db.execute("INSERT INTO stock VALUES (2, 'MUG-12', 3)")


def test_shared_sku_text_does_not_cross_product_descriptions():
    db = database()
    db.executemany("INSERT INTO merchant VALUES (?, ?)", [(1, 'North Shop'), (2, 'South Shop')])
    db.executemany("INSERT INTO product VALUES (?, ?, ?)", [(1, 'BASIC', 'North basic'), (2, 'BASIC', 'South basic')])
    db.executemany("INSERT INTO stock VALUES (?, ?, ?)", [(1, 'BASIC', 4), (2, 'BASIC', 9)])

    rows = db.execute("SELECT merchant_id, product_name, on_hand FROM available_stock ORDER BY merchant_id, product_name").fetchall()
    assert rows == [(1, 'North basic', 4), (2, 'South basic', 9)]
